heading: Definitions
label: 2002 Definitions
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was set out in a note under prior to the general amendment of by .section 3 of Pub. L. 106–193section 1902 of this titlePub. L. 106–193Pub. L. 109–58

Transfer of FunctionsThe Minerals Management Service was abolished and functions divided among the Office of Natural Resources Revenue, the Bureau of Ocean Energy Management, and the Bureau of Safety and Environmental Enforcement. See Secretary of the Interior Orders No. 3299 of , and No. 3302 of , and chapters II, V, and XII of title 30, Code of Federal Regulations, as revised by final rules of the Department of the Interior at 75 F.R. 61051 and 76 F.R. 64432.May 19, 2010June 18, 2010
amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior was set out in a note under prior to the general amendment of by .section 3 of Pub. L. 106–193section 1902 of this titlePub. L. 106–193Pub. L. 109–58

children.heading: Contract
children.label: 1 Contract
children.text: The term “contract” means a procurement contract within the meaning of .section 6303 of title 31

children.heading: Cooperative agreement
children.label: 2 Cooperative agreement
children.text: The term “cooperative agreement” means a cooperative agreement within the meaning of .section 6305 of title 31

children.heading: Director
children.label: 3 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the National Science Foundation.

children.heading: Grant
children.label: 4 Grant
children.text: The term “grant” means a grant awarded under a grant agreement (within the meaning of ).section 6304 of title 31

children.heading: Industrial enterprise
children.label: 5 Industrial enterprise
children.text: The term “industrial enterprise” means a private, nongovernmental enterprise that has an expertise or capability that relates to methane hydrate research and development.

children.heading: Institution of higher education
children.label: 6 Institution of higher education
children.text: The term “institution of higher education” means an institution of higher education (as defined in ).section 1002 of title 20

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 7 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Energy, acting through the Assistant Secretary for Fossil Energy.

children.heading: Secretary of Commerce
children.label: 8 Secretary of Commerce
children.text: The term “Secretary of Commerce” means the Secretary of Commerce, acting through the Administrator of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.

children.heading: Secretary of Defense
children.label: 9 Secretary of Defense
children.text: The term “Secretary of Defense” means the Secretary of Defense, acting through the Secretary of the Navy.

children.heading: Secretary of the Interior
children.label: 10 Secretary of the Interior
children.text: The term “Secretary of the Interior” means the Secretary of the Interior, acting through the Director of the United States Geological Survey, the Director of the Bureau of Land Management, and the Director of the Minerals Management Service.
